subject: [PATCH v6 10/20] nfsd: add notification handlers for dir events

2026-06-11.patch_summary: This patch adds support for directory events in the NFS server (nfsd). It introduces a new notification handler for directory changes and creates a CB_NOTIFY request to handle these notifications. The patch also allocates an nfsd_notify_event object and hands off a reference to each delegation's CB_NOTIFY. If any errors occur during this process, it recalls any affected delegations. This change aims to improve the handling of directory events in the NFS server.
